2026-0181
2026-02-26TCFinancial Administration ActOrder amending the condition to increase the maximum number of VIA HFR — VIA TGF directors to 11Order Amending Order in Council P.C. 2022-261 of March 24, 2022 by replacing "maximum of seven directors" with "maximum of eleven directors".N/A
subject: Order amending the condition to increase the maximum number of VIA HFR — VIA TGF directors to 11
precis: Order Amending Order in Council P.C. 2022-261 of March 24, 2022 by replacing "maximum of seven directors" with "maximum of eleven directors".
